name: Flan-T5 XXL
archDisplay: Dense encoder-decoder Transformer (11B, T5 + Flan instruction tuning)
note: 11B instruction-tuned T5; popularized the Flan instruction-tuning recipe on fully open weights.
tpsNote: T5/encoder-decoder support in llama.cpp is limited/experimental; no widely measured RTX 4090 llama.cpp throughput figures found.

results.notes: 5-shot, direct prompting, Table 3/5 of Scaling Instruction-Finetuned Language Models

Table 5 ('Scaling Instruction-Finetuned Language Models'), Flan-T5-XXL (11B) row, MGSM held-out benchmark, CoT prompting, 10-language average. Score is genuinely very low compared to the PaLM-family rows in the same table -- T5's pretraining/tokenizer is not optimized for multilingual math reasoning, so this is real, not an error.

GPQA Diamond subset (acc_norm 0.2576), from the Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated evaluation run of google/flan-t5-xxl (results_2024-08-27T14-49-35 JSON, confirmed via the HF datasets API card metadata). Score is near random-chance (4-choice), consistent with an 11B encoder-decoder model from 2022 evaluated zero-shot/generative on a benchmark it was never tuned for -- not an error. [score corrected during round-12 accuracy re-verify: 25.8 -> 27.01, per verifier: Same error pattern as the Pythia-6.9B GPQA finding. The official aggregated GPQA (acc_norm) score from open-llm-leaderboard/contents for google_flan-t5-xxl_float16 is GPQA Raw = 0.2701342281879195 = 27.01%. The claimed 25.8 corresponds only to the GP]
leaderboard_mmlu_pro acc 0.2343, Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated run of google/flan-t5-xxl, confirmed via the HF datasets API card metadata for this results file.

leaderboard_ifeval prompt-level strict accuracy 0.1571, Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated run of google/flan-t5-xxl, confirmed via the HF datasets API card metadata. [score corrected during round-12 accuracy re-verify: 15.7 -> 22, per verifier: HF's own documented Open LLM Leaderboard v2 methodology (huggingface.co/docs/leaderboards/open_llm_leaderboard/about) states IFEval is measured via BOTH inst_level_strict_acc and prompt_level_strict_acc. The leaderboard's actual published IFEval scor]

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via Hugging Face google/flan-t5-xxl model card: 11B params, Apache 2.0 license, matches record. Fetched full paper text (ar5iv rendering of arxiv 2210.11416) Table 5 and confirmed Flan-T5-XXL (11B) scores literally: MMLU 5-shot direct = 55.1, BBH 3-shot direct = 45.3 -- both kept as exact matches. Context length is genuinely ambiguous across sources (tokenizer default 512, but Flan instruction-tuning used ~1024-token input sequences per the paper, and some summaries cite up to 2K); left ctxK=1 (1024) as a reasonable middle estimate rather than fabricating false precision. No changes to core fields.
